title: Truthful Mini App/API port conflict follow-up
acceptanceCriteria: Mini App occupied-port handling on 3001 is either proven correct with evidence or fixed to distinguish legitimate HappyTG reuse from foreign conflict.
Port 3001 is attributed truthfully, including BaseDeploy/Caddy-backed or Docker-backed listeners when determinable.
Installer/bootstrap performs product-level preflight port checks before launch and reports occupied ports without raw stack traces.
Occupied-port diagnostics identify the listener, classify reuse vs conflict, and point to explicit env overrides without hidden auto-reassignment.
API occupied-port reuse behavior on 4000 remains intact.
Regression coverage exists for touched Mini App, API, and bootstrap/install conflict paths.
Proof bundle is complete and backed by real artifacts plus a fresh independent verifier pass.
